title: GET /api/v1/media/:id leaks metadata without auth
description: get_media handler (media.rs:360) returns media attachment metadata (file_path/URL, description, dimensions, blurhash) for any media ID without requiring authentication or verifying ownership. An attacker can enumerate media IDs to discover upload URLs and alt-text of unattached drafts or private post attachments. Should require auth and verify the media belongs to the caller or is attached to a post they can see.
